Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue To Los Angeles County

Kitty Xie, Esq. of HANEY & SHAH LLP, Tel: 213.228.6500, for defendant/moving party;
No other appearance.

DEFENDANT VOLAR FASHION, LLC, BIG 5 CORPORATION's unopposed "motion to transfer venue of action to Los Angeles County" is granted. Plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs.

Order signed.
